meta.name: Roadmap Prioritization Engine
meta.description: Score backlog items using a configurable formula (RICE, ICE, or custom), enrich with research evidence, and produce a ranked roadmap.

parameters.content:
## 11 — Roadmap Prioritization Engine

**Required:**
- Google Sheets: BACKLOG_SHEET_ID with columns: id, title, description, reach, impact, confidence, effort, tags
- OpenAI API credential
- NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Formula:** RICE by default (Reach × Impact × Confidence / Effort)
Change PRIORITIZATION_FORMULA to 'ICE' for Impact × Confidence × Ease.

**Schedule:** Every Friday at 14:00

values.content: You are a product manager reviewing a prioritized backlog. Add brief rationale for the top items. Return JSON only.

value.title: 📊 Roadmap Priority Update: {{ $('Merge Enrichment').first().json.total }} items ranked
value.body: Weekly roadmap prioritization complete. Top item: {{ $('Merge Enrichment').first().json.ranked_roadmap[0]?.title || 'N/A' }}
